project.name: TeacherHub
project.description: A teacher-focused web app replacing paper planners with a clean, professional digital interface.
project.target_audience: Teachers and Administrators in Puerto Rico (Bilingual EN/ES).

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers (h1, h2, h3)

body.usage: UI elements, form inputs, data tables, paragraphs

primary.name: Deep Slate Ink
primary.usage: Primary Text, Active Borders, Strong CTAs

accent.name: Sage Growth
accent.usage: Success states, Progress bars, Primary Buttons (muted)

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise/grain overlay on the main background to mimic paper texture.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-sm, shadow-md) to lift elements slightly off the 'paper'.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with low opacity (border-slate-200) to mimic printed lines.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-md (Standard, not too round, not too sharp - professional)

planner.structure: A horizontal scroll or grid of 5 columns (Mon-Fri). Clicking a day expands to the detailed form.
planner.form_layout: Two-column layout mimicking the paper form: Left for Unit/Story info, Right for Date/Standards.

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: bg-stone-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-400 rounded-md

navigation.style: Sidebar or Topbar with clear, legible icons. Active state: bg-stone-100 text-slate-900 font-medium.

images.description: Group of children sitting, conveying a warm, active classroom environment.
Subtle white paper texture for background overlay.

universal_guidelines: Do not center align the app container.
Use 'Manrope' for all UI text, 'Playfair Display' for major headings.
Maintain a 'Paper & Ink' aesthetic: high contrast text, off-white backgrounds.
Forms must be dense but legible, mimicking the paper reference.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'TeacherHub' with a focus on the 'Paper Replacement' metaphor. The UI should feel like a high-end digital planner. Use the provided image URLs to structure the 'Lesson Planner' form fields exactly (Unit, Story, Standards, Expectations). Ensure the 'Gradebook' uses a clean data-grid layout. Prioritize the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette.
